rows: CREATE INDEX idx_kv_collection_name ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING btree (((metadata ->> 'collection_name'::text)))
CREATE INDEX idx_kv_embedding ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops)
CREATE INDEX idx_kv_embedding_hnsw ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops)
CREATE INDEX idx_kv_identifier_tokens ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING gin (identifier_tokens)
CREATE INDEX idx_kv_metadata ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING gin (metadata)
CREATE INDEX idx_kv_search_vector ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING gin (search_vector)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX t_knowledge_vector_pkey ON public.t_knowledge_vector USING btree (id)

mrl_probe.interpretation: A cosine near 1 confirms the API's 1536-dimensional output is the normalized MRL prefix, not an unrelated projection.

pro_bge_service_probe.quality_handling: Reuse BAAI/bge-m3 quality results; compare only latency/stability.
